summary: Frontend testing of Puzzle Master Blast - Icon fix verification. All icons now visible and prominent in score section (star for score, trophy for high score) and power-ups bar (bomb, shuffle, extra time). Timer icon visible in Timed mode.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported (expected for Expo web)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Icon fixes verified working. All icons now use Ionicons with circular background containers for prominence.

score_section_icons.details: Star icon (gold circle background) for 'Skor' (Score), Trophy icon (red circle background) for 'En Yüksek' (High Score) - both clearly visible with 22px icons in 36px circular containers

power_ups_bar_icons.details: 3 power-up buttons visible: Bomb/flame icon (orange, 26px), Shuffle icon (purple, 26px), Extra time icon (blue, 26px) - all in 54px button containers

timed_mode_timer_icon.details: Timer icon (teal circle background) for 'Süre' with countdown (2:57) displayed prominently in timed mode

classic_mode_gameplay.details: Game screen loads with 8x8 board, score display, XP bar, power-ups bar, draggable block pieces

home_screen.details: All 4 game modes visible: Klasik Mod, Zamanlı Mod, Çok Oyunculu, Turnuva. Bottom navigation: Sıralama, Ödül, Temalar, Görevler

tournament_screen.details: Shows 'Haftalık Turnuva', countdown timer (3 gün 14 saat), prize table, leaderboard, 'Turnuvaya Katıl' button

themes_modal.details: Opens 'Blok Temaları' modal with 8 themes: Klasik (active), Neon Gece, Altın, Okyanus, Gün Batımı, Galaksi, Şeker, Orman

daily_rewards_modal.details: Auto-appears on home load, shows 7-day calendar with day rewards, 'Ödülü Al!' claim button

score_section.star_icon: Visible - gold/yellow color with golden circle background (rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2))
score_section.trophy_icon: Visible - red/coral color (#FF6B6B) with red circle background (rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.2))
score_section.timer_icon: Visible in timed mode - teal color (#4ECDC4) with teal circle background

power_ups_bar.bomb_icon: Visible - orange flame icon, 26px size, in 54px button
power_ups_bar.shuffle_icon: Visible - purple shuffle icon, 26px size, in 54px button
power_ups_bar.extra_time_icon: Visible - blue time icon, 26px size, in 54px button

icon_fix_verification.icon_implementation: All icons use @expo/vector-icons Ionicons with circular background containers (iconContainer style) for visual prominence

mocked_functionality.AdMob: Banner, interstitial, and rewarded ads are MOCKED for web preview - functional on native builds only
mocked_functionality.note: Production builds will have real AdMob integration
